changes: True Strike: Potency increased from 140 to 160 (does not affect rear potency).
Snap Punch: Potency increased from 130 to 150 (does not affect flank potency).
Twin Snakes: Potency increased from 100 to 110 (does not affect flank potency).
Demolish: Potency increased from 30 to 50 (does not affect rear potency).
Dragon Kick: Potency increased from 100 to 120 (does not affect flank potency).
Fists of Fire: Increase to damage dealt changed from 5% to 6%.
Cure: Enmity reduced.
Medica: Enmity reduced.
Cure II: Enmity reduced.
Cure III: Enmity reduced.
Medica II: Enmity reduced.
Benediction: Enmity reduced.
Tetragrammaton: Enmity reduced.
Assize: Recast time reduced from 60 to 45 seconds; potency increased from 300 to 400; healing potency increased from 300 to 400.
Plenary Indulgence: Duration increased from 10 to 30 seconds; enmity reduced.
Split Shot: Ammunition effect potency increase changed from 25 to 30.
Slug Shot: Ammunition effect potency increase changed from 25 to 30.
Spread Shot: Ammunition effect potency increase changed from 25 to 30.
Hot Shot: Ammunition effect potency increase changed from 25 to 30; increase to physical damage dealt changed from 8% to 10%.
Clean Shot: Ammunition effect potency increase changed from 25 to 30.
Gauss Round: Potency increased from 200 to 210.
Ricochet: Potency increased from 300 to 320.
Cooldown: Ammunition effect potency increase changed from 25 to 30.
Heated Split Shot: Ammunition effect potency increase changed from 25 to 30.
Heated Slug Shot: Ammunition effect potency increase changed from 25 to 30.
Heated Clean Shot: Ammunition effect potency increase changed from 25 to 30.
True North: Recast time reduced from 150 to 90 seconds.

Rage of Halone: Combo bonus changed from 'Reduces target's attack potency and healing magic potency by 10%' to 'Reduces target's damage dealt and healing potency by 10%' and now affects healing from non-magical abilities.
Defiance: Effect changed from 'Increases maximum HP and own HP recovery via healing magic by 20%, while reducing damage dealt by 20%.' to 'Reduces both damage taken and damage dealt by 20%.'
Inner Beast: Damage reduction lowered from 20% to 10%.

Power Slash: Combo bonus changed from 'Reduces target's HP recovered by healing magic by 15%' to 'Reduces target's HP recovered by healing actions by 15%' and now affects healing from non-magical abilities.

Skewer: Additional effect changed from 'Reduces target's attack potency and healing magic potency by 10%' to 'Reduces target's damage dealt and healing potency by 10%' and now affects healing from non-magical abilities.
Katon: Potency increased from 1,250 to 1,500.
Hyoton: Potency increased from 750 to 1,000.
Raiton: Potency increased from 1,750 to 2,000.

Miasma III: Additional effect changed from 'Reduces target's HP recovered by healing magic by 10%' to 'Reduces target's HP recovered by healing actions by 10%' and now affects healing from non-magical abilities.
Chain Stratagem: Reduction to damage taken changed from 5% to 10%.
Embrace: Healing potency increased from 1,000 to 1,500.

Lord of Crowns: Additional effect changed from 'Reduces target's HP recovered by healing magic by 10%' to 'Reduces target's HP recovered by healing actions by 10%' and now affects healing from non-magical abilities.

new_content.name: Surpassing the Samurai
new_content.description: Chronicles of a New Era quest.

new_content.name: The Path of Most Resistance
new_content.description: Chronicles of a New Era quest.

new_content.name: Take with a Tonze of Salt
Between a Rock and the Hard Place
He Ain't Piggy, He's My Brother
The Masked Carnivale
new_content.description: A solo challenge duty exclusive to blue mage.

new_content.name: Doman mahjong
new_content.description: A tile-based board game added to the Manderville Gold Saucer.

new_content.name: World Visit system
new_content.description: System allowing players to visit other World servers in their data center.

housing.name: Black-and-white Interior Wall
housing.description: A wooden interior wall painted with a monochrome pattern of wide horizontal stripes.

housing.name: Teal Blue Carpeting
housing.description: Durable yet fuzzy loop carpet in a soothing blue-green.

housing.name: Carbuncle Chandelier
housing.description: Because who doesn't want to be welcomed home from a hard day's adventuring by a carbuncle hanging from their ceiling?

housing.name: Botanist's Garden
housing.description: A vegetable patch so lovingly tended that it could only have been cultivated by an expert.

housing.name: Washbasin
housing.description: An elegant, stand-alone sink for washing up before dinner. And you will wash up before dinner.

housing.name: White Rectangular Partition
housing.description: Thus named despite the fact that none would fain expect a blue triangle.

housing.name: Fat Cat Sofa
housing.description: So large. So fluffy.

housing.name: Mirific Mogshelf
housing.description: A charming bookshelf topped with decorative moogles beckoning readers to the myriad worlds that come alive through the written word.

housing.name: Tree Slice Tower
housing.description: Pets love it! Miqo'te, too!

housing.name: Steppe Kitchen
housing.description: This cooking facility was fashioned after those used by the Xaela tribes of the Azim Steppe.

housing.name: Paint Can
housing.description: The size of this can is indicative of an ambitious home improvement project. The amount of paint remaining suggests that said project has proven more difficult than expected.

housing.name: Emerald Crystal Boule
housing.description: A mounted sample of the luminous green crystals that grow uninhibited on the sea floor.

housing.name: Tier 3 Metal Aquarium
housing.description: A large reinforced glass tank that, when filled with water, can serve as a home for select wavekin caught in the wild.

housing.name: Tier 4 Metal Aquarium
housing.description: A massive reinforced glass tank that, when filled with water, can serve as a home for select wavekin caught in the wild.

housing.name: Travel Paint Set
housing.description: A robust, portable set of art supplies for adventurous artists and artistic adventurers.

housing.name: Seiryu Statuette
housing.description: An elegant carving of the venerable Seiryu. The geomantic orb in its claws reputedly fills one's home with auspicious energies.

housing.name: Bag of Booty
housing.description: The shine of the historic coins contained within has been professionally restored with great care.

housing.name: Undersea Spoils
housing.description: Not all that glitters is gold. This is, though.

housing.name: Level Checker Replica
housing.description: A model of an advanced piece of technology described in the pages of a─rather eccentric─ancient tome.

housing.name: Cerulean Crystal Boule
housing.description: A mounted sample of the luminous blue crystals that grow uninhibited on the sea floor.

housing.name: Fat Cat Bank
housing.description: Presumably due to the resemblance in terms of rotundity, the fat cat has overtaken the pig as a popular motif for coin banks.

housing.name: Bowl of Oden
housing.description: A heaping bowl of juicy fishcakes, tender daikon, hearty boiled eggs, and other savory ingredients steeped for hours in a warming broth.

housing.name: Fruit Stall
housing.description: A two-tiered unit displaying assorted colorful fruit.

housing.name: Vegetable Stall
housing.description: A large shelf packed with artfully displayed vegetables.

housing.name: Pastry Cupboard
housing.description: Shelves lined with an assortment of pre-plated sweets to sell, share, or...not.

housing.name: Mineral Display
housing.description: Glittering gemstones meticulously arranged atop several tiers of shelving.

housing.name: Fabric Rack
housing.description: A neatly arranged collection of assorted fabrics and spindles of thread for sale.

housing.name: Potion Rack
housing.description: These shelves are packed with enough concoctions and extracts to run a full apothecary.

housing.name: Prism Pouch
housing.description: A pouch for many standard-sized prisms, or one extremely large one.

housing.name: Marimo Lamp
housing.description: The product of a skilled yet not particularly creative metalworker who took inspiration from the lamp marimo to create...a lamp containing lamp marimo.

housing.name: Honey Pot
housing.description: Keeping this much honey in the house is just asking for bear-related trouble.

housing.name: Plush Pile
housing.description: Stuffed moogles and tonberries and bears, oh my.

housing.name: Season Eleven Lone Wolf Trophy
housing.description: A trophy awarded to those who "left their mark" in Season Eleven of the Feast.

housing.name: Small Imitation Window
housing.description: Despite its size─and the minor detail of it not being a real window─this plain would-be portal provides a surprising amount of light.

housing.name: Botanist's Dried Herbs
housing.description: An assortment of pleasant-smelling medicinal and culinary herbs verified to be non-toxic. Mostly.

housing.name: Four Lords
housing.description: An evocative ink depiction of the Four Lords.

housing.name: Wooden Loft
housing.description: Create the perfect space for sleeping, reading, displays, or enjoying an insurmountable advantage in pillow fights with this wall-mounted platform.

housing.name: Wooden Steps
housing.description: Useful in climbing up to lofts or removing rival heirs.

housing.name: Wooden Beam
housing.description: For use with the wooden loft, though beam enthusiasts are sure to enjoy it regardless.

housing.name: Hanging Planter Shelf
housing.description: Various potted plants dangle from this wall-mounted shelf, leaving the space atop it free for other items. Or more plants.

housing.name: Red Carpet
housing.description: A slim length of carpeting to welcome honored guests.

housing.name: Lily of the Valley Pips
housing.description: Mature rootstalks that will grow and flower with sweet-smelling (though highly poisonous) bell-shaped blooms.
